subject: Cloud Computing
title: VPN and Private Connectivity
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on VPN and Private Connectivity.

hook.text: Your office needs a secure link to your cloud. Sending data over the public internet isn't safe enough.

buildup.text: A VPN creates an encrypted tunnel between your network and the cloud, hiding traffic from eavesdroppers.

discovery.text: For higher performance, AWS Direct Connect and Azure ExpressRoute provide dedicated physical links.

twist.text: Dedicated links cost thousands per month. Most small companies use VPN instead and accept the trade-off.

climax.text: Private connectivity removes the public internet from the equation. It's slower to set up but much more secure.

punchline.text: VPN is the tunnel. Direct connect is the private highway.

quiz.question: What is the main advantage of AWS Direct Connect over a VPN?
options: It provides a dedicated physical connection that bypasses the public internet
It's free for all AWS customers
It doesn't require any network configuration
